summary_en: 3.0M shares (6.5% of shares outstanding), ¥3.0B upper limit, to be acquired via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 15 to July 31, 2026. Stated purpose: capital structure reconstruction through deployed assets and tactical capital allocation response to operating environment.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock under Articles 156 and 165(3) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief:
On May 14, 2026, Cybozu's board of directors resolved to acquire up to 3.0 million treasury shares, representing 6.5% of shares outstanding, for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥3.0 billion. The acquisition will be executed via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period May 15 through July 31, 2026.

The stated rationale is to reconstruct the company's capital structure by deploying held assets and to enable flexible capital allocation in response to changes in the operating environment. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 6,513,715 treasury shares out of 46,244,085 shares outstanding (excluding treasury shares).
